title: WorkflowSpec

specVersion.description: Semantic version of the SourceOS spec this record conforms to.

nodes.description: List of WorkflowNode steps that make up the pipeline.

edges.description: List of WorkflowEdge directed dependencies between nodes.

triggers.description: List of Triggers that initiate this workflow.

policyBindings.description: PolicyBinding associations applied to nodes within this workflow.

description: A directed acyclic graph of WorkflowNodes and WorkflowEdges defining a multi-step data processing pipeline, with scheduling triggers and policy bindings.
